title: Overgrown Flowery GUI - Sunshine Hunger
description: Turn Overgrown Flowery GUIs water droplets into Sunshine!  This pack replaces the food shanks with sunshine icons, with compatibility for Thirst Was Taken and other Thirst mods
body:
![Overgrown Flowery GUI Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IUJGdLaw/images/c11eaf0acd61d4f66442179667a827a3d788d12e.png)  

Do you like drinking water in Minecraft? Do you love using Overgrown Flowery GUI?  
Now you don't have to choose between the two!  

This resource pack was spun off as its own project due to the unique challenge of making water look like water when food... already looks like water.  
We solve the issue by turning food into sunshine instead!  

This project still Requires [Overgrown Flowery GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overgrown-flowery-gui) or [Overgrown Flowery Hotbar](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overgrown-flowery-hotbar) for the full experience, as it only changes the hunger bar by itself.
